company_information_modal_description: Details about your organisation are currently non-compliant. You need to update them to comply with the new electronic invoicing requirements. <anchor>Find out more about e-invoicing</anchor>. Enter your SIRET (or company registration number) and we will handle the rest.
company_information_modal_info_individua: If your account is not a business, please go to the profile editing form and change the account type to 'Individual'.
